THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORP RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WEN, HAO $3,324.55 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,389.55, THE APPEAL OF THE DENIAL OF THE MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. BASED ON EVIDENCE AND ARGUMENTS AT TODAY'S HEARING FROM BOTH SIDES N THE ORIGINAL JUDGEMNT IS REDUCED BY $444.38 FOR CHARGES BILLED PRIOR TO RETAINER AGREEMENT BEING SIGNED ON 06/23/24 (SEE 09/11/24 INVOICE SUBMITTED AS EVIDENCE) IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGEMENT IS AFFIRMED.
